name: Holiday Hot Cocoa Mug Interactive Baby Toys Set - 3pc - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your baby active, while adding holiday fun to their space with the 3-Piece Holiday Hot Cocoa Mug Interactive Baby Toys Set from Cloud Island™. This three-piece baby toy set includes a hot cocoa mug along with festive plush toppings wearing a Santa hat and a cozy scarf for festive appeal. Made of 90% recycled polyester fabric, this holiday interactive toy makes a beautiful decorative accent in their nursery during the holidays or as a sweet gift.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
